subcodes.title: Words spoken at Baltimore Hotel in Paris, 1913-05-11
subcodes.first_line: There are three paths through which man attains spiritual happiness. The first path is the path of ordeals, trials and difficulties.
subcodes.subjects: @attaining the life of the spirit, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @attainment to faith in the twinkling of an eye, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
